events.title: US Strikes Iran in Retaliation for Tanker Attacks
events.desc: Following attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz, the United States military conducted strikes on Iranian missile sites and command centers. Iran claimed to have attacked US bases in response, indicating a significant escalation of hostilities between the two nations.

events.title: Trump Threatens 'Decimation' of Iran if Assassinated
events.desc: US President Donald Trump issued a stark warning, stating he has ordered military preparations for strikes to 'decimate and destroy all areas of Iran' should the Iranian government attempt to assassinate him. This statement follows heightened tensions and recent exchanges of fire.

events.title: Iran Insists Ceasefire Holds Amidst US Truce Declaration
events.desc: Iran has asserted that it has adhered to the ceasefire agreement with the United States, despite President Trump's declaration that the truce is over. This comes after a recent memorandum of understanding aimed at de-escalating tensions.

events.title: US Demands Public Commitment from Iran on Strait of Hormuz Shipping
events.desc: Senior U.S. officials are pressing Iran for a public commitment to cease attacks on vessels in the Strait of Hormuz and ensure all shipping lanes are open and toll-free. Iran has resisted relinquishing control over this critical oil transit route.

events.title: New US Sanctions Target Iran's Financiers Amid Strait of Hormuz Tensions
events.desc: The U.S. Treasury Department has imposed new sanctions on a key financier of Iran's Supreme Leader and 13 other individuals and entities. These measures follow Iran's renewed attacks on oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Hizballah Conflict Mentioned in US-Iran Deal Framework
events.desc: A framework agreement between the United States and Iran included a commitment to terminate military operations on all fronts, explicitly mentioning the Israel-Hizballah conflict. This suggests a broader diplomatic effort to de-escalate regional tensions.

events.title: Explosions in Damascus During French President's Visit
events.desc: Bomb explosions occurred in Damascus, injuring 18 people, during the visit of French President Macron. Syrian state television reported that President Assad welcomed Macron at the presidential palace amidst the incident.

events.title: Russian Advance Reaches Outskirts of Zaporizhzhia
events.desc: The mayor of Zaporizhzhia has reported that a Russian advance has reached the outskirts of the Ukrainian city. Emergency crews are conducting searches for survivors following a Russian air strike.
